name: SanDisk SDXC Extreme 64GB UHS-I (Read 170MB/s and Write 80MB/s)
description: With a SanDisk Extreme SD UHS-I memory card, save time transferring media with read speeds of to 170MB/s powered by SanDisk QuickFlow8 Technology. With shooting speed and recording speed, you are ready to capture high-resolution 4K UHD video without lag.

features.Key Features: Capacity 64 GB | Dimensi : 31.92mm x 23.91mm x 2.17mm | Sequential Read Performance Up to 170MB/s | Sequential Write Performance Up to 80MB/s
